crystallinity.phase: Amorphous at 100°C, Polycrystalline at 150°C and above

otherAspects.safety: ZnO ALD uses DEZn and O₂, which require careful handling. Plasma treatment involves O₂ plasma, which needs safety precautions for exposure.
